reasoning: Today's workout addresses your lactate clearance limiter by incorporating over-under intervals aimed at enhancing fatigue resistance and aerobic base. Your last ride showed a relatively low average power, so this session will better prepare you for targeted intensity during the key Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 6 sets of 5 min over (242-256W), 3 min under (201-218W), focus on controlled breathing and recovery

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
